idea-plugin.name: dubbo-tool
idea-plugin.description:
This is a plugin for initiating local Dubbo invoke, which can quickly generate calling methods and parameters.
Key Features：
1、Quickly generate Dubbo invocation methods and parameters
2、User-friendly interface integrated in IDEA
3、Right-click to trigger calls on interface methods
Applicable Scenarios:
1、Directly invoke and debug Dubbo services in development environment
2、Instantly verify request/response data structures without writing test cases
3、Test providers without consumer dependencies dubbo-tool

English Introduction
  • 1. Go to the IDEA Settings interface, select Tools → Dubbo-Tool, and configure the Dubbo invoke address (currently supporting Zookeeper registry and direct Dubbo calls).
  • 2. Right-click the target interface method, select and click the RunDubboTool option. In the pop-up window, choose the input parameter fields (all selected by default), click OK, and the Dubbo call main panel will appear.
  • 3. Select the Dubbo call address, modify the Dubbo call parameters, and then click the Invoke button to initiate the call.
  • 4. When the call is successful, the Response section on the right will display the returned result. If an exception occurs, the corresponding error stack trace will be shown.
中文介绍
一款用于帮助使用 IntelliJ IDEA 编写代码的研发人员，快速在本地调用Dubbo服务的插件工具。
  • 1. 进入idea配置界面，选择Tools --> dubbo-tool，配置dubbo调用的地址（目前支持zookeeper注册中心跟dubbo直接调用）
  • 2. 鼠标右键要调用的接口方法，选择点击RunDubboTool方法，在弹出框中选择入参字段（默认选中所有），点击ok，弹出dubbo调用主面板
  • 3. 选择Dubbo调用地址，修改Dubbo调用入参，然后点击Invoke按钮，即可发起调用
  • 4. 成功调用时，右侧Response区域会显示调用返回的结果。如果调用异常，则显示对应的异常栈
